justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted the user's initial request for "after lunch around 13" as 13:00 and then accurately understood the follow-up request for "around 9 AM" as 09:00.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively handled the unavailability of the initial time by asking the user if they wanted to check other times on the same day or another day, which is a good way to negotiate.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent was efficient, handling the initial request and the subsequent time adjustment without any unnecessary turns or redundant information requests.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer experience was smooth and professional, with the agent quickly understanding and addressing the user's requests without any friction.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent recovered gracefully after the initial time was unavailable, maintaining full context and offering a clear path forward to find an alternative time.
